archive.selection: All directories and repository files with extensions html, md, css, js, json, svg, txt, py, yaml, or yml. Large images, videos, fonts, and PDFs are represented by the complete GitHub tree manifest but not mirrored in this Git-friendly textual snapshot.

release_boundary: This is the official project-site repository at a commit dated 2026-07-09, after arXiv v3 (2026-06-11/12). It is post-v3 evidence and must not be treated as the exact paper-time implementation.
availability_note: The official page labels the Dataset button 'Coming Soon'. The repository is a project-site/showcase release, not the 338-task benchmark package. The textual snapshot contains four prompts and all 24 action/thought trajectory manifests; their referenced screenshots and other large media are listed in the complete tree manifest but were not mirrored. No full benchmark task records, VM images, initialization scripts, grader code, scoring records, or paper result inventory were available.
license_note: GitHub reports no repository license; no license claim is made for reuse of the archived site assets.
